description: Calculate travel time reliability for the Bologna Acosta corridor using the configuration at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/run.sumocfg. Perform five simulation runs using seeds 1001, 1002, 1003, 1004, and 1005, applying a random departure offset of 120 to each. Generate tripinfo XML outputs for each run in ~/SUMO_Output/. From the aggregated duration data of all completed trips across the five runs, calculate the total number of completed trips, the mean trip duration, and the 95th percentile trip duration. Save these metrics to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/reliability_report.json using the schema: {"total_trips": <int>, "mean_duration": <float>, "p95_duration": <float>}.
